creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: olivierd
Date: Mon Jul 22 16:47:52 2013
New Revision: 323478
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323478

Log:
  - Update to 0.11
  - Replace tab by space in WWW entry (pkg-descr)
  
  PR:		179623
  Submitted by:	myself
  Approved by:	Oleg Pudeyev (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile	Mon Jul 22 16:41:20 2013	(r323477)
+++ head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile	Mon Jul 22 16:47:52 2013	(r323478)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Frozen-Flask
-PORTVERSION=	0.9
+PORTVERSION=	0.11
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

 This project used to be called Flask-Static.
